---
title: "CHIKV | Cell proportion tests"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "03.P.integration"
  input_rds: "integrated_so.rds"
  this_step: "04.P.prop_test"
  output_rds: "so_w_prop.rds"
  n_permutations: 1000
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(baia.ext.cellprop.plots)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis))
input_var_dir <- file.path(analysis_root, "steps", params$input_step, "results", "vars")
this_step_dir <- file.path(analysis_root, "steps", params$this_step)
var_dir <- file.path(this_step_dir, "results", "vars")

if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir, call. = FALSE)
}
dir.create(var_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r load}
so <- readRDS(file.path(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
```

# Cell proportion permutation tests

The upstream integrated object is split into project-defined comparison sets.
Each comparison is tested for all cell types and for configured broad cell-type
subsets.

```{r project_configuration, echo=TRUE}
cell_subsets <- list(
  B = c("B cells"),
  CD4 = c("CD4+ T cells"),
  CD8 = c("CD8+ T cells"),
  T = c("CD4+ T cells", "CD8+ T cells", "CD4-/CD8- T cells"),
  Dendritic = c("Dendritic cells"),
  Monocytes = c("Monocytes")
)

comparison_sets <- list(
  A = list(
    data = subset(so, TimePoint == "A"),
    cluster_identity = "celltype.abbrev",
    sample_identity = "clinical_condition",
    sample_1 = "Non-Chronic",
    sample_2 = "Chronic"
  ),
  `6m` = list(
    data = subset(so, TimePoint == "6m"),
    cluster_identity = "celltype.abbrev",
    sample_identity = "clinical_condition",
    sample_1 = "Non-Chronic",
    sample_2 = "Chronic"
  ),
  NC = list(
    data = subset(so, clinical_condition == "Non-Chronic"),
    cluster_identity = "celltype.abbrev",
    sample_identity = "TimePoint",
    sample_1 = "A",
    sample_2 = "6m"
  ),
  C = list(
    data = subset(so, clinical_condition == "Chronic"),
    cluster_identity = "celltype.abbrev",
    sample_identity = "TimePoint",
    sample_1 = "A",
    sample_2 = "6m"
  )
)
```

```{r run_tests, echo=TRUE}
so@misc$cell_subsets <- cell_subsets
so@misc$proptest <- lapply(comparison_sets, function(definition) {
  result <- list(all = run_cellprop_permutation(
    definition$data, definition, n_permutations = params$n_permutations))

  for (subset_name in names(cell_subsets)) {
    subset_obj <- subset_cellprop_data(definition$data, subset_name, cell_subsets)
    result[[subset_name]] <- run_cellprop_permutation(
      subset_obj, definition, n_permutations = params$n_permutations)
  }

  result
})
```

## Saving data

```{r save, echo=TRUE}
saveRDS(so, file.path(var_dir, params$output_rds))
```

## Session info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
